risks.name: Fortified Foes
risks.desc: Guardian Eximus units may be encountered, including Guardian Eximus Necramechs.

deviations.name: Sealed Armor
deviations.desc: Enemies take 90% less damage from non-weak point hits.

risks.name: Postmortal Surges
risks.desc: Slain enemies burst with Void energy.

risks.name: Commanding Culverins
risks.desc: Rogue Culverins equip weapons that deal 5x Damage to Overguard and Necramechs.

deviations.name: Coordinated Front
deviations.desc: Eximus units support The Fragmented Tide and its final form.

risks.name: Bolstered Belligerents
risks.desc: All enemies have Overguard equal to 50% of their max health.

deviations.name: Miasmite Mash
deviations.desc: Enemies drop Miasmites upon death that immediately rush Flare.

risks.name: Scaldra Speed Run
risks.desc: All enemies are replaced with Scaldra and move much faster.

risks.name: Balloonfest
risks.desc: Scaldra Harbingers are more numerous and attack and move more quickly.

deviations.name: Growth Hormones
deviations.desc: Legacytes are more powerful with each generation but take longer to escape.

risks.name: Corrupted Flesh
risks.desc: Techrot enemies are infused with Efervon and take damage over time. They explode when killed and leave behind deadly Efervon in their wake.

risks.name: It's Alive
risks.desc: Within the underground, hostile overgrowths will attack if players stop moving.

deviations.name: Thermian Plating
deviations.desc: Only Thermian RPGs can damage the tank. Reinforcements that carry Thermian RPGs will arrive during the fight.

risks.name: Myopic Munitions
risks.desc: Enemies will only take damage if a player is within 15m of them.

events.name: Psionic Feedback
events.desc: 10% chance to set off a 250 damage, 5m radius blast of Radiation.

events.name: Harden Up
events.desc: Increases Overshield cap by 50%. Kills grant 50 shields.

events.name: Make It Personal
events.desc: Kill 150 Scaldra Troops with Melee Weapons

events.name: Redemptive Chance
events.desc: Killed enemies have a chance of reviving as allied specters at 1% chance per status stack. Lasts 30 sec.

events.name: Bad Medicine
events.desc: Health Orbs create a 10m wide explosion on pickup, damaging enemies. Gain +50 Armor for each enemy hit, for 30s.

events.name: Punchcard
events.desc: Add +1.5m punch through to primary weapons.

events.name: Practiced Precision
events.desc: +20% Melee Critical Chance (x2 for Heavy Attacks).

jobs.challenge: Find a Zarium Accolade and take it to Melica
Awaken a dormant Void Angel and defeat it
Collect Vosphene Glyphs to active 4 defenses
Techrot emerges from beneath as an additional threat
Capture 3 Legacytes. No extraction before target is met
Capture 3 Legacytes. No extraction before target is met
